overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a drive through a futuristic dystopian industrial district at sunset. The camera navigates an elevated highway system, pausing beneath a massive floating megabuilding to showcase the scale of the architecture, with industrial smokestacks and communication towers visible in the hazy distance.

events.description: overtaking several vehicles while driving along the multi-lane highway
slowing down and turning right toward the massive floating megabuilding structure

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed along the elevated highway, navigating through moderate traffic while approaching the massive floating megabuilding

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in the left lane parallel to the camera
white vehicle approaching from behind with headlights on

entered.detail: large overhead metal sign structure with directional arrows and illuminated text
tall smokestacks emitting white smoke into the evening sky
massive floating building with blue and white geometric facade and red warning lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive along an elevated industrial highway at sunset. The camera passes beneath large overhead sign gantries and approaches a massive floating megabuilding structure while navigating through moderate traffic. Industrial smokestacks are visible in the distance against the orange sky.

events.description: moving from open highway to the sheltered space beneath the massive floating megabuilding
coming to a complete stop to pan the camera upward and admire the building undercarriage

agents.ego_description: stopped under the megabuilding, slowly panning the camera to admire the massive scale of the floating structure and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: massive overhanging concrete structure with detailed mechanical underbelly and red warning lights along the edges
thick cylindrical structural columns holding up the floating building
elevated railway line running parallel to the highway with metal supports
large parabolic satellite dishes on distant rooftops

segments.scene_description: The camera slows to a stop beneath the massive floating megabuilding, transitioning from the open highway to a sheltered, semi-enclosed space. The view pans upward to reveal the building's detailed undercarriage and support pillars, while satellite dishes and elevated train tracks become visible in the background. The lighting shifts to a mix of sunset glow and artificial red warning lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial communications district with elevated transit

events.description: exiting the shadow of the megabuilding back into open sky with full sunset view
yellow train passes on the elevated tracks to the right of the highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway, driving past the communications array with tall towers and satellite dishes while a train passes on parallel tracks

notable_agents.action: yellow train moving along elevated tracks parallel to the highway

entered.detail: tall cylindrical industrial tower with illuminated vertical window strips

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the megabuilding's shadow and accelerates along the highway through an industrial communications district. A tall cylindrical communication tower dominates the center view while satellite dishes and elevated train tracks line the right side. A yellow train passes on the parallel tracks as the megabuilding recedes into the left background.

events.description: navigating through multiple vehicles while approaching highway signs

agents.ego_description: continuing at high speed along the highway, navigating through moderate traffic in the industrial district with smokestacks visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: dark vehicle driving in the left lane ahead of the camera
vehicle with headlights on approaching from the right side

entered.detail: low-rise industrial structures with corrugated metal facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued high-speed driving along the industrial highway, navigating through moderate traffic. The camera passes beneath overhead sign gantries while industrial buildings line the left side and distant smokestacks punctuate the horizon. The communications towers and train tracks have receded, leaving an open highway view with warm sunset lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed journey along an elevated industrial highway that transitions from an open sunset vista into the shadow of a colossal megastructure before returning to the open road. It begins with a rapid drive beneath overhead sign gantries, passing through moderate traffic as industrial smokestacks punctuate the orange horizon. As the camera slows to a stop, the scene shifts into a sheltered space beneath a massive floating megabuilding, where the view pans upward to reveal a detailed undercarriage illuminated by a mix of sunset glow and artificial red warning lights. The camera then accelerates out of the shadow and into a communications district, passing a dominant cylindrical tower and a yellow train on parallel tracks while the megabuilding recedes into the background. Finally, the movement returns to a high-speed cruise through the industrial district, passing further gantries and buildings as the horizon opens back up under the warm light of the setting sun.
